concerns.text: T021 (contract test for precision validation) is placed BEFORE implementation tasks T022-T070. Tests must be written AFTER implementation per spec convention ('Write these tests AFTER implementation - Tests require the code to exist first'). This violates producer-consumer ordering.
T031 (contract test for regression model output) is placed BEFORE implementation tasks T032-T039. Same violation as Phase 4 - tests cannot run before the code they validate exists.
T042 (integration test for edge case handling) is placed BEFORE implementation tasks T044-T053. Same violation - tests must follow implementation to ensure independent testability.

T073-T086 are marked [P] (parallel-safe) but have implicit dependencies: T076 depends on T073/T075, T077 depends on T044/T045, T078 depends on T077, T084 depends on T032-T034. [P] tags require explicit independence - hidden ordering requirements violate parallel-safety semantics.

T011-T012 tests are correctly placed AFTER implementation (T013-T026), establishing the correct pattern. However, this pattern is inconsistently applied in Phases 4-6. Recommend standardizing test placement across all user stories for independent shippability.
